publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-09-17 23:59:21 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Posters, promotional materials, flyers and postcards documenting the techno, house, and electronic music cultures in Germany and other European countries.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Techno Music Poster Collection, #8010. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Posters advertising parties, exhibitions, CD releases, magazines, and other techno events/products. Included are posters for Berlin's Loveparade and the Mayday music festival.

did.unittitle: Series II. Flyers and event programs
Mayday: a New Chapter of House and Techno (programs)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly flyers for clubs in Hamburg and Frankfurt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Mayday (Dortmund), Shake! (Bochum), Power Plant (Munich), and Disco Fever (St. Pauli).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly flyers for clubs in Hamburg and Frankfurt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for A Family Affair, and Melting the Pot.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Lime Club, WTF, Kit-Kat Klub, and Knaack.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Ständige Vertretung, Electric Ballroom, and Jet Stream Club.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Himmelreich, Unsichtbar, Toaster, and Jet Stream Club.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for No UFOs and Tacheles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Strike Club and Lime Club.

did.unittitle: Germany -- Berlin -- Love Parade, et al.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes flyers for Home, Soap!, Earth Beats, and Tribal Rave.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes flyers for Delicious Doughnuts Research, Bunker, Jet Stream Club, Matrix, and Die Insel.

did.unittitle: Germany -- Berlin -- small flyers and stickers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Babylon, Backstage, K41, and Powerplant.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Club Code, Marrakech Disco, Palace Dance Club, and Flört Disco Factory.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Elvis House Club, Extrem Music Club, Lovebarikad, and Kvkopsz.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Sing-Sing, Hooch Party, Club Discovery, and Eden Hashish Party.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Club Panorama, Meghivo, and Korona Disco.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for clubs in France, England, and the Tunnel in New York.

did.unittitle: United Kingdom -- Mostly Bristol -- quarter cards/small
United Kingdom -- Mostly London -- quarter cards/small

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Pomelo, Sharp, and Mego in Vienna as well as flyers from London and Rome

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for JAIL, Utopia, and Kaufleutensaal (Zürich).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Sensor and Kaufleutensaal.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes flyers for Deluxe Club (Innenhof), Kaufleutensaal (Zürich), and Trax @ Rohstofflager (Zürich).

did.unittitle: Series III. Periodicals, catalogs, and promotional brochures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chiefly German.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials advertising Techno-related products and services as well as booklets on drug safety.

did.unittitle: Ten Dance: Magazin für House & Techno

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes München Up-Dates Flyer (June 1998), Freeload (2001?), Dr. X's Partyguide (1997).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Postcards (chiefly German) promoting art exhibitions, movies, CDs, parties, products, services, safe sex, and political parties. Most are Edgar Freecards, which were ubiquitously displayed in clubs and bars around Germany in the 1990s and early 2000s.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Edgar Freecards and postcards advertising bars, club apparel, CDs, art exhibitions, and more.
